summary: Latency-first smoke test on ATMAN MVP. Backend (5/5) endpoints pass. Frontend hero, scroll-to-section, performances iframes (3), testimonials carousel prev/next + dots, booking submission (verified persisted in DB), and mobile menu all pass. Two minor observations noted.
passed: POST /api/bookings valid payload -> 201 with id + created_at
GET /api/bookings -> 200, list sorted latest first (verified Ada Lovelace top after submit)
Hero loads: ATMAN wordmark, tagline 'Music That Touches The Soul', 3 genre pills (Bollywood/Sufi/Rock), Book & Watch buttons visible
Testimonials next button cycles quote; dot indicator (testimonial-dot-2) changes quote
Booking form: filled all fields, selected event type (Luxury Wedding), submitted -> form cleared and new entry appears in GET /api/bookings
Mobile viewport (390x844): nav-menu-toggle opens menu with 8 mobile links; clicking mobile link navigates

failed.issue: Selector [role='gridcell'] button did not match shadcn Calendar day cells within timeout; could not automate date selection. Submission still succeeded because event_date is optional. Needs verification whether Calendar exposes accessible day buttons for users/tests.
failed.evidence: Playwright: 'Locator.click: Timeout 3000ms exceeded — waiting for locator("[role=\"gridcell\"] button:not([disabled])").first' after clicking booking-date-btn.

failed.issue: Toast confirmation text was not captured via [role=status]/[class*=toast] selectors after successful and invalid-email submits. Success is confirmed indirectly (form cleared + backend record). For invalid email, no visible error text was captured either — user feedback for invalid email may be missing or rendered via a different mechanism (e.g., Sonner portal outside queried nodes).
failed.evidence: toast_text=''; toast2='' in both success and invalid-email flows.

action_items: Verify user-visible toast is rendered on successful submit and on invalid-email submit (likely using Sonner). If using Sonner, ensure a toast.error is shown when email validation fails client-side or when backend returns 422.
Optionally add data-testid on calendar day buttons (e.g., data-testid=calendar-day) to make date selection testable; not blocking since field is optional.
